💡 Firebase not configured — friends can’t see each other’s edits yet. Tap for 3-min setup

Connect Firebase

Free backend so everyone can log flights, promoters, and check off tasks — and the whole group sees it live.

1
Go to console.firebase.google.com → Create project → disable analytics
2
Build → Realtime Database → Create database → Start in test mode
3
Project Settings (gear) → Your apps → </> Web → Register → copy firebaseConfig
4
Open this HTML in a text editor, find FIREBASE_CONFIG near top of the script tag, paste your values
5
Drag this file + leopard-bg.jpeg + all squad-*.jpg photos to netlify.com/drop together

The Closet
July 29 – August 2
The Itinerary
01
Day One • Arrival
Wednesday, July 29
Land. Unbox. Pool. Slay.
Afternoon
Check in to the Grand Beach Hotel
Set up room decor, pool time, stock the fridge from Instacart
Night
First Night Dinner Goal: Promoter Dinner
Everyone is reaching out to promoters before we land. Goal is a free table, bottle, or discounted entry. Log your contacts in The Mamis tab. Venue TBD once confirmed.
02
Day Two • Beach Day
Thursday, July 30
Sun, sand, Sexy Fish.
Morning
Bon Bouquet Cafe Breakfast
Floral and feminine. Good coffee, good vibes before the beach.
All Day
Nikki Beach Club Locked
The iconic South Beach day club. Loungers, pool, DJ, all-day energy.
Dinner
Sexy Fish Locked
Brazil wears the sparkly Nigerian tailored dress. Sleek, glam, mermaid ceiling.
Night
Thursday Night Out TBD
03
✨ The 24-Hour Birthday Party • 9AM → 9AM ✨
Friday, July 31
This is what we came for.
9 AM
THE PARTY STARTS NOW
Brunch
WATR Rooftop at 1 Hotel TBD — Front-runner
18 floors above the Atlantic. Peruvian-Japanese, DJ energy. Book this reservation ASAP.
Midday
Pilates ClassPass trial
Afternoon
Pink Yacht — Feeling Yachty Locked
Brazil wears Tiffany blue on the boat. Saves the gold dress for tonight. BYO drinks.
Dinner
Amazónico THE BIRTHDAY DINNER
Brazil wears THE gold dress. Dress confirmed OK. Dinner then straight to the club — no stopping.
Night
Club All Night TBD venue
No leaving until 7AM+. This is the 24-hour party. We stay.
04
Day Four • Recovery Glam
Saturday, August 1
We still cute though.
Happy Hr
Cactus Club Locked
3–7pm + 10pm–close happy hour. Smart-casual dress code (no athletic wear).
Dinner
Option A: Gianni’s at the Versace Mansion Potential
Option B: Beach Picnic Potential if budget allows
Either way, Brazil wears the white cutout dress. Deciding closer to the trip.
05
Day Five • Fly Home
Sunday, August 2
We did that. We really did that.
All Day
Checkout, last swim, final brunch, airport.
Uber buddy pairs are in the Travel tab.
Where We’re Eating
The Dining Guide
First Night — TBD
Wed Night • Goal: Promoter Dinner

Everyone is working to lock a promoter dinner before we land. Free table, bottle, or reduced entry. Log your contacts in The Mamis tab. Venue updates once confirmed.

Bon Bouquet Cafe
Thu Morning • Locked

Floral, feminine breakfast spot. Good energy before Nikki Beach.

Nikki Beach Club
Thu All Day • Locked

Iconic South Beach day club. Loungers, pool, DJ, all-day party energy.

Sexy Fish
Thu Dinner • Locked

Sleek Asian-inspired glam. The massive mermaid ceiling is a whole vibe. Brazil wears the sparkly Nigerian tailored dress here.

Amazónico
Fri Birthday Dinner • THE DRESS

Jungle-botanical, theatrical, live music. Dress confirmed OK. From here straight to the club. This is THE moment.

Cactus Club
Sat Happy Hour • Locked

Happy hour 3–7pm + 10pm–close. $9 smash burger. Smart-casual only.

Gianni’s at the Versace Mansion
Sat Dinner • Potential

The Villa Casa Casuarina. Baroque mosaics, the famous Versace pool. Brazil wears the white dress. Confirming closer to trip.

DM Template — Copy & Send
“Hey! We’re a group of [X] girls coming to Miami July 29–August 2 for a birthday. We’re especially looking for Friday July 31 for the birthday but open to the whole run!”
